Senior Full-Stack Developer (Angular + NestJS)
Company: FinEdge Solutions
Location: Warsaw / Hybrid
Type: B2B, long-term

About FinEdge:
FinEdge Solutions provides white-label financial software for banks and credit unions in CEE. Our platform handles loan origination, risk scoring, and customer onboarding for 15+ banking institutions. Team of 60 engineers, agile, English-speaking.

We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Developer to own feature development end-to-end — from Angular UI to NestJS microservices.

Requirements (must-have):
- 5+ years of software development experience
- Angular (version 10+) — forms, routing, state management
- NestJS for backend microservices
- TypeScript across the full stack
- REST API design and implementation
- PostgreSQL or another relational database
- RxJS for reactive data handling
- Unit testing (Jest) on both frontend and backend
- Git, CI/CD pipelines

Nice to have:
- NgRx or other Angular state management
- Docker and Kubernetes basics
- GraphQL
- Redis for caching
- Microservices architecture patterns
- Banking or fintech domain experience
- SonarQube, code quality tools
- Agile / SAFe experience

What you will do:
- Design and implement full-stack features: Angular UI + NestJS API + database schema
- Build complex Angular forms for loan application and risk assessment workflows
- Implement NestJS microservices with REST and event-driven communication
- Write unit and integration tests for both layers
- Participate in architecture decisions and cross-team API contracts
- Code review across frontend and backend

Tech stack:
Angular 14-17, NestJS, TypeScript, RxJS, NgRx, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Jest, REST API, GitHub Actions

We offer:
- 24 000 – 30 000 PLN/month B2B
- Hybrid (Warsaw office 2 days/week)
- Stable, long-term project
- Banking domain expertise
